name: workflow-studio
description: Node-based workflow studio for AI-powered Jira, Slack, and process composition

scripts.build: esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --outdir=dist --external:readline --external:@inquirer/prompts && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='dist/cli.js';fs.writeFileSync(f,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'))" && chmod +x dist/cli.js
